prerequisites.value: Dex 13, Wis 13, Perfect Style, Quick Draw, base attack bonus +9 or monk level 9th.

description.value: **Benefit:** When using Perfect Style, you double the range increment of any thrown weapon you wield. You can spend 1 ki point as a swift action to imbue a number of thrown weapons equal to your Wisdom bonus with the returning or seeking weapon special ability for 1 round. Combat Trick Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: You can spend 2 stamina points instead of 1 ki point when using Unfolding Wind Strike.
